description: Automated and manual audit rules for the Pagination component.

rules.rule: Root element must be <nav> with aria-label
rules.check: Element must be a <nav> element with a non-empty aria-label attribute

rules.rule: Current page item must have aria-current='page'
rules.check: The active page button must have aria-current='page' attribute

rules.rule: Nav buttons must have accessible names
rules.check: prev/next buttons must have aria-label (e.g., 'Previous page', 'Next page')

rules.rule: Page number buttons should have aria-label='Page N'
rules.check: Each interactive page item button should have aria-label for screen readers

rules.rule: Overflow trigger must be an interactive button with disclosure ARIA attributes
rules.check: Overflow item must be a <button> with aria-label, aria-expanded, and aria-haspopup='listbox'. It is NOT a static span — it opens a page-jump panel.
rules.pass_example: <button class='pagination__item pagination__item--overflow' aria-label='More pages' aria-expanded='false' aria-haspopup='listbox'>...</button>

rules.rule: Overflow panel must have listbox role and accessible name
rules.check: The panel element must be a <ul> with role='listbox' and aria-label='Jump to page' (or equivalent localized label)

rules.rule: Overflow options must use role='option' and aria-selected on the selected item
rules.check: Each option button must have role='option'. The selected page must have aria-selected='true' and include a visible check indicator.
Root element must have exactly one of: .pagination--lg, .pagination--md, .pagination--sm

rules.rule: Page items must use position: relative for ::after selector indicator
rules.check: CSS must set position: relative on .pagination__item to anchor the ::after pseudo-element

rules.rule: Disabled nav buttons should use aria-disabled when preserving focus
rules.check: If nav button must remain focusable for AT navigation, prefer aria-disabled='true' over disabled attribute

rules.rule: No hardcoded visual values in component CSS
rules.check: All color, spacing, radius, and font values must use CSS custom properties (var()). No hex, px, or named color literals allowed in non-fallback positions.

rules.rule: Component-level tokens must be defined in token.css
rules.check: All --pagination-* tokens must exist in token.css with values. Fallbacks in component CSS are acceptable for development only.
rules.notes: All --pagination-* tokens are currently missing. See analysis.md Missing Tokens.

rules.rule: Focus indicator must never be suppressed
rules.check: No outline: none or outline: 0 on interactive elements without a visible replacement focus indicator

rules.rule: RTL must use dir attribute, not CSS class
rules.check: RTL layout must be triggered by dir='rtl' on the <nav> element, not by a separate .pagination--rtl class

.pagination--sm produces 24px touch targets, below the recommended 44px minimum for touch interfaces. Consider providing a larger hit area via padding expansion or using .pagination--md or .pagination--lg in touch contexts.

rules.rule: Template classes / CSS selector orphan check
rules.check: Every class used in template.html must have a corresponding selector in pagination.css. Every selector in pagination.css must be used in at least one template or showcase variant.
